name: Royal Haircut & Styling
description: Precision scissor/clipper cut with scalp massage, hot towel treatment, blow dry, and premium pomade styling.

name: Classic Fade
description: High, mid, or low fade blended to perfection. Includes hot lather neck shave.

name: Rustik Beard Sculpting & Razor Line
description: Detailed beard trimming, oil therapy, massage, and sharp straight-razor cheek & neck clean lines.

name: The Gentleman Combo
description: Royal Haircut + Beard Sculpting combined. Save money and walk out looking like royalty.

name: Signature Hair Coloring & Highlights
description: Premium dye work, highlights, or gray coverage customized to your skin tone and style.

name: Charcoal Purifying Facial Treatment
description: Deep pore extraction, steam mask, cold stone massage, and luxury gold serum application.
